source_intake_record.raw_question_text: <image_1>A student performs the photoelectric effect experiment and obtains the data depicted in the accompanying graph of E_{km} (maximum kinetic energy) of photoelectrons v. the frequency of the photons. What is the approximate work function of this material?

requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the problem cannot be solved reliably from text alone.

multi_step: Solving requires at least two steps: read or infer a value/relationship from the graph, then apply the photoelectric-effect relation to obtain the work function.
The graph-based phrasing suggests combining visual interpretation with physics knowledge rather than simple lookup.
Multiple-choice format limits open-ended complexity, so the reasoning burden is moderate rather than very high.
verifiability: answer_type=short_text and the provided answer is a concise numeric value with units ('1.5 eV').
There are 4 answer choices, which supports straightforward answer matching.
registry_passed=true and the image asset exists, so downstream checking is feasible.
